## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `./motspilot.sh ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error output if available.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11 + Git Bash)
- Bash version: (run `bash --version`)
- Claude Code version: (run `claude --version`)
- motspilot version: (check git tag or commit)
